item.title: 谷歌领导行业联盟推出代理资源发现规范
item.summary: Google, Microsoft, Nvidia, and over a dozen partners published the Agentic Resource Discovery (ARD) v0.9 specification — an Apache 2.0-licensed standard that gives AI agents a federated, intent-based method for discovering tools, APIs, and other agents across organizational boundaries, addressing the critical missing d
